summary: The page reproduces all four sections in correct order with strong text fidelity and a close visual match on the hero, content blocks, and footer. Main deductions stem from the EDS content-block sections (Section 02) lacking the required eds-card signature class, the inverse banner image being stretched to ~1661px tall (causing large mismatch in the careers banner region), and several font-weight/color token issues in the footer.

issues.expected: content-block built on EDS canonical markup carrying class 'eds-card'
issues.actual: cb1-card / cb2 blocks use only custom utility classes; no eds-card on these content blocks
issues.fix: Add the 'eds-card' signature class to the Section 02 content-block components

issues.actual: image rendered 1366x1661px (stretched too tall, large mismatch in y 2496-2688 render region)
issues.fix: Constrain the cb3 background image height to the design 776px ratio
Set Global Operations link color to #404040 and font-weight 400

issues.expected: font-weight 600 for 'This is our global website...'
web x≈996px, menu-down x≈1120px, magnify x≈1191px @1366
issues.fix: Align hero-nav-inner to the 1366 artboard padding so icons sit at the spec x positions
Adjust footer column offsets so external-link icons align with spec

issues.actual: divider rendered as CSS span/border, source SVGs not referenced
issues.fix: Reference the line-32 SVG assets or confirm the CSS equivalent matches design
Use the manifest divider asset or ensure border matches its width/position

issues.actual: hero-title font-size 33px/line-height 33px, weight 400 — smaller than design display scale
issues.fix: Increase hero title size/weight to match the design display heading
